body:
## What's Changed
* feat: export in interactive mode by @kadogo in https://github.com/dundee/gdu/pull/298
* feat: handle vim-style navigation in confirmation by @samihda in https://github.com/dundee/gdu/pull/283
* fix: panic with Interface Conversion Nil Error by @ShivamB25 in https://github.com/dundee/gdu/pull/274
* fix: Enter key properly working when reading analysis from file by @dundee in https://github.com/dundee/gdu/pull/312
* fix: check if type matches for selected device by @dundee in https://github.com/dundee/gdu/pull/318
* ci: package gdu in docker container by @rare-magma in https://github.com/dundee/gdu/pull/313
* ci: add values for building gdu with tito by @daniejstriata in https://github.com/dundee/gdu/pull/288
* ci: change Winget Releaser job to `ubuntu-latest` by @sitiom in https://github.com/dundee/gdu/pull/271

## New Contributors
* @samihda made their first contribution in https://github.com/dundee/gdu/pull/283
* @ShivamB25 made their first contribution in https://github.com/dundee/gdu/pull/274
* @kadogo made their first contribution in https://github.com/dundee/gdu/pull/298
* @rare-magma made their first contribution in https://github.com/dundee/gdu/pull/313

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/dundee/gdu/compare/v5.26.0...v5.27.0
name: gdu v5.27.0
